    Authors and Citation

    Authors

    • Oscar Ospina. Author, maintainer.

    • Alex Soupir. Author.

    • Brooke Fridley. Author.

    • Satija Lab. Copyright holder.
      Copyright holder of code fragments from Seurat function FindVariableFeatures

    Citation

    Ospina O, Soupir A, Fridley B (2024). spatialGE: An R package for visualization and analysis of spatial heterogeneity in spatially-resolved gene expression. Bioinformatics, 40(3), btae123. doi:10.1093/bioinformatics/btae123

    @Article{,
  title = {spatialGE: An R package for visualization and analysis of spatial heterogeneity in spatially-resolved gene expression},
  author = {Oscar Ospina and Alex Soupir and Brooke Fridley},
  journal = {Bioinformatics},
  year = {2024},
  volume = {40},
  number = {3},
  pages = {btae123},
  doi = {10.1093/bioinformatics/btae123},
  url = {https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btae123},
}

    Ospina O, Soupir A, Fridley B (2024). spatialGE: Visualization and Analysis of Spatial Transcriptomics Data. R package version 2.0.0. https://github.com/ACSoupir-OC/spatialGE

    @Manual{,
  title = {spatialGE: Visualization and Analysis of Spatial Transcriptomics Data},
  author = {Oscar Ospina and Alex Soupir and Brooke Fridley},
  year = {2024},
  note = {R package version 2.0.0},
  url = {https://github.com/ACSoupir-OC/spatialGE},
}

    Additional details

    # spatialGE Authors and Contributors

## Primary Authors

**Oscar Ospina** - Original creator and lead developer
- Role: Author, Maintainer
- Email: oscar.ospina@jhmi.edu
- ORCID: 0000-0001-5986-4207

**Alex Soupir** - Major contributor and co-developer
- Role: Author
- Email: Alex.Soupir@moffitt.org
- ORCID: 0000-0003-1251-9179
- Contributions: C++ optimizations, STenrich enhancements, modular architecture

**Brooke Fridley** - Senior author and PI
- Role: Author
- Email: Brooke.Fridley@moffitt.org
- ORCID: 0000-0001-7739-7956

## Institutional Affiliation

Moffitt Cancer Center
Tampa, Florida, USA

## Copyright Holders

- Code: Oscar Ospina, Alex Soupir, Brooke Fridley (MIT License)
- Seurat code fragments: Satija Lab (used with permission)

## Funding

This work was supported by NIH grants [to be added].

## Acknowledgments

- Satija Lab for Seurat code fragments (FindVariableFeatures)
- Spatial transcriptomics community for testing and feedback

    On this page

    Developed by Oscar Ospina, Alex Soupir, Brooke Fridley.
